title: hieracium lachenalii subsp. farinosiceps
intro: Hieracium lachenalii subsp. farinosiceps, also known as a type of hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion-like genus Hieracium. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium lachenalii subsp. farinosiceps include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its possible antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture or infused in hot water to make a tea, which can be used to treat various health issues, although it's essential to consult a medical professional before using it as a treatment.
